title: 菊花賞の後に・得られた言葉は

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
King Halo is ecstatic after winning the Kikuka
Sho. Before her excitement wears off, she calls up
her mother.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Surely now, her mother will recognize her skill.
However, her mother's remarks seem all too
superficial. Is she still not convinced?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The crowd also seems bent on bursting King
Halo's bubble. Even in their cheer and praise,
they refuse to acknowledge her as anything but
"her mother's daughter."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The next day, it seems King Halo has done some
thinking alone. She asks me if I'm ready to throw
everything away with her.
